sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59042" key="korakeu/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κορακ-εύς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">έως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, kind of <sense id="n59042.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fish</tr_>, prob. <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κορακῖνος</ref></xr>, Id.</sense> </entryFree>
